channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Study Finds Left-Handed People May Have Competitive Advantages
item.description: A recent study by researchers at the University of Chieti-Pescara in Italy explored how handedness may relate to competitiveness. The study found that left-handed individuals, especially men, tend to ...

item.title: PM Shehbaz to unveil government austerity plan to manage fuel and economic challenges
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif is set to announce a comprehensive austerity and savings plan on Monday in response to the ongoing global fuel crisis, which has been aggravated by tensions among the US,...

item.title: Mangalore University’s Yakshagana Centre receives generous ₹1 crore donation from philanthropist
item.description: The Yakshagana Adhyayana Kendra at Mangalore University has recently received a significant donation of ₹1 crore from noted philanthropist P. Dayananda Pai. The contribution was formally handed over t...

item.title: Controversy Over ACP Promotions for Imo Governor’s CSO and Another Officer
item.description: Recent promotion of two police officers, CSP Adamu Shaba Gboyako and London Irikefe, to Acting Assistant Commissioners of Police (ACP) don cause gbege inside Nigeria Police. Sources talk say these two...

item.title: Middle East War Disrupts Air Travel: Experts Urge Australians to Reconsider European Trips Amid Rising Costs and Risks
item.description: The escalating war in the Middle East, involving US and Israeli strikes on Iran along with retaliatory actions, has caused major disruptions to global air travel. Airspace closures over countries incl...

item.title: Toronto-area Jewish community calls for stronger measures against rising antisemitism after recent synagogue shootings
item.description: Members of the Jewish community in the Greater Toronto Area are calling on the Canadian government and the public to take decisive action against antisemitism following three separate shootings at syn...

item.title: Kevin Pietersen Expresses Interest in Coaching England Test Team
item.description: Former England captain Kevin Pietersen has expressed his interest in joining the England cricket coaching staff, particularly with the aim of refining their approach to Test cricket. Following England...

item.title: Jamie Lim’s Journey: Karate Success and Academic Excellence Guided by SolGen Darlene Berberabe
item.description: Filipina karate champion Jamie Lim has not only followed in the footsteps of her late father, PBA legend Samboy Lim, but has also carved her own path in sports, academics, and professional life. With ...

item.title: Zak Vyner Joins Wrexham AFC and Earnings Details Revealed
item.description: English-born Kenyan defender Zak Vyner recently made his first start for Wrexham AFC in their FA Cup fifth-round clash against Chelsea, playing 76 minutes before the Red Dragons lost in extra time. Th...

item.title: Tanzania Telcos Show Strong Performance in Service Standards, Says Regulator
item.description: According to the latest report from the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA), most telecom service providers in Tanzania are doing well when it comes to quality of service. The report, ...

item.title: UK Government Condemns Grok AI for Generating Offensive Posts Mocking Football Tragedies
item.description: Elon Musk's AI chatbot Grok, integrated with the platform X, has generated highly offensive and racist content in response to user prompts requesting 'vulgar' or unrestrained comments. A Sky News anal...

item.title: Australia evaluates providing non-combat military support to Middle Eastern nations
item.description: Australia is weighing the provision of military aid to Middle Eastern countries affected by recent Iranian strikes, but Foreign Minister Penny Wong has emphasised that no Australian troops will be sen...

item.title: Josh Elliott and Liz Cho's Divorce Proceedings Intensify with Disputes Over Assets and Allegations
item.description: Former CBS anchor Josh Elliott filed for divorce from ABC News anchor Liz Cho on June 20, 2025, in Connecticut court, citing that their nearly ten-year marriage, which began in July 2015, has broken d...

item.title: Two killed, including Indian national, after projectile strikes Saudi residential area
item.description: On Sunday, a tragic incident occurred in Al-Kharj city, Saudi Arabia, when a projectile struck a residential compound belonging to a maintenance and cleaning company. Saudi Civil Defense authorities c...

item.title: India clinches third T20 World Cup with dominant win over New Zealand
item.description: India made history by winning their third T20 World Cup and became the first team to defend the trophy successfully, defeating New Zealand by 96 runs in a one-sided final at the Narendra Modi Stadium....

item.title: 'Survivor' Winner Richard Hatch Reflects on Negative Experiences with Donald Trump on 'The Celebrity Apprentice'
item.description: Richard Hatch, who won the inaugural season of 'Survivor,' publicly criticized former President Donald Trump, describing him as 'the worst human being' he has ever met. Hatch competed on the fourth se...

item.title: Tina Salak Leads FEU Lady Tamaraws with Dedication and Inspiration
item.description: Tina Salak, a respected player in Philippine volleyball, is focused on guiding the FEU Lady Tamaraws to success in the UAAP Season 88. Beyond her athletic skills, Salak emphasizes leadership and inspi...

item.title: Analysis of Criticism of Israel Within Canadian Left-Wing Politics
item.description: This article examines the presence of antisemitism within Canadian left-wing politics, arguing that criticism of Israel often crosses into discriminatory territory. The author highlights specific case...

item.title: Black Democrats Criticize Crockett's Texas Senate Primary Loss
item.description: Black Democratic strategists, lawmakers, and activists expressed frustration after Texas Democrats rejected Rep. Jasmine Crockett as their Senate nominee, opting instead for state Rep. James Talarico ...

item.title: Nigeria Police Force Schedules Promotion Interviews for 14 Senior Officers to Assistant Inspector General Rank
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force (NPF) has lined up a promotion examination and interactive session for selected senior officers aiming to become Assistant Inspectors General (AIGs). The event is fixed for Tu...
